description: NutriMindz AI is a nutrition-focused web product from TechChase GmbH that provides a searchable nutrient database and food nutrient rankings based on the German BLS food composition dataset.
summary: NutriMindz exposes a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt.nutrimindz.ai/mcp`; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation was found on the domain.
